creator: dryice@dryice.name
text:
- update to 0.7.2

	- remove the patch that prevent an egg build. The (coming)
	  TurboGears-devel like it to be an egg.

	- add MASTER_SITES

	- removed file: files/patch-setup.py

	- add optional MSSQL support

	- take maintainership. Thanks the previous maintainers!

	- there is an open PR for this port: ports/105686. I think it
          is resolved in ports/106296 by Rafan, which is committed at
          Dec 4. So ports/105686 could be closed.
